description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a minimalist design, featuring large rectangular volumes and extensive use of concrete and glass. The structure is composed of two main blocks, one slightly elevated above the other, with broad, open terraces and green roof sections. The front facade includes a wide staircase leading up to a recessed entryway, flanked by low concrete walls and a large, grassy courtyard. Expansive windows line the upper block, providing ample natural light and a strong visual connection between the interior and exterior. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a large, private lawn, bordered by concrete walls for privacy. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, with a focus on open spaces and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed concrete bungalow with large windows, open terraces, and green roof sections, featuring minimalist geometric forms and spacious lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide staircase, recessed entryway, and green roof sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, long concrete walls, and extended terrace areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive private lawn, large windowed facade, and open terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible driveway, entry path, and additional green spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
